snippets.src:
Inductive Even : nat -> Prop :=
| EvenO : Even O
| EvenS : forall n, Even n -> Even (S (S n)).
snippets.rendered: io("coq", { sentence(code("Inductive Even : nat -> Prop :=\n| EvenO : Even O\n| EvenS : forall n, Even n -> Even (S (S n))."), none) })

snippets.src:
Fixpoint even (n: nat): bool :=
  match n with
  | 0 => true
  | 1 => false
  | S (S n) => even n
  end.

Arguments even : simpl nomatch.
snippets.rendered:
io("coq", { sentence(code("Fixpoint even (n: nat): bool :=
  match n with
  | 0 => true
  | 1 => false
  | S (S n) => even n
  end."), none); code("
"); sentence(code("Arguments even : simpl nomatch."), none) })

snippets.src:
Lemma even_Even :
  forall n, even n = true <-> Even n.
Proof.
  induction n.
  all: cbn.
  - split.
    all: constructor.
  - Fail apply IHn.

snippets.src:
Lemma even_Even :
  forall n, (even n = true <-> Even n) /\
       (even (S n) = true <-> Even (S n)).
Proof.
  induction n; cbn.
  - repeat split; cbn.
    all: try constructor.
    all: inversion 1.
  - destruct IHn as ((Hne & HnE) & (HSne & HSnE)).
    repeat split; cbn.
    all: eauto using EvenS.
    inversion 1; eauto.
Qed.

snippets.src:
Fixpoint even_Even_fp (n: nat):
  even n = true <-> Even n.
Proof.
  destruct n as [ | [ | n ] ]; cbn.
  - repeat constructor.
  - split; inversion 1.
  - split.
    + constructor; apply even_Even_fp; assumption.
    + inversion 1; apply even_Even_fp; assumption.
Qed.
